description: (a) Spread of final_score (variance, range) on unrounded values. (b) Sanity-check correlations (Spearman for all three pairs: final–cos, final–avoid, cos–overlap); identity check final ≈ cos − α×avoid; optional regression summary. Random profiles; Fisher z aggregation; undefined correlations excluded.

per_run.composer: Johanna Kinkel (originally published under the name J. Mathieux)
